conditions.label: Public contract audit
conditions.note: Audit raporu henüz yüklenmedi (manual işaretleme gerekli)

modules.name: Genesis Block Specification
modules.description: Formal specification of LSC genesis block — supply, validator set, chain ID, genesis state

modules.name: DAG Topology Design
modules.description: DAG vertex/edge structure, tip selection algorithm (GHOST protocol variant), orphan handling

modules.name: SAC Consensus Protocol
modules.description: SoulwareAI Autonomous Consensus — leader-free BFT, DAG-based finality, 2,100 validator support

modules.name: DAG Engine Core (Rust)
modules.description: Core DAG engine: block production, vertex validation, fork resolution, 10ms block time target

modules.name: Quantum-Resistant Cryptography
modules.description: CRYSTALS-Dilithium-3 signatures, Kyber-1024 key exchange, quantum-proof transaction signing

modules.name: P2P Network Layer (Go)
modules.description: libp2p-based node discovery, 2,100 validator gossip protocol, sub-100ms propagation target

modules.name: Validator Node System
modules.description: Validator registration, staking contract, rotation algorithm, slashing conditions

modules.name: SoulwareAI On-Chain Governor
modules.description: Fully autonomous on-chain governance — no human key required for protocol upgrades

modules.name: AIDAG ↔ LSC Bridge
modules.description: Trustless cross-chain bridge: BSC AIDAG ↔ LSC Coin, zkProof verification layer

modules.name: Internal Testnet Alpha
modules.description: Internal 50-node testnet, consensus stress test, TPS benchmarking (10K target)

modules.name: Public Testnet Beta
modules.description: Public validator onboarding, community stress test, 100K TPS benchmark, audit

modules.name: LSC Mainnet Launch
modules.description: Genesis block mined, validators active, AIDAG↔LSC bridge opens, LSC trading begins

logEntries.msg: Quantum module activated — CRYSTALS-Dilithium-3 research phase begun
SAC consensus protocol initialized — no single leader, pure DAG BFT
DAG architecture selected — Directed Acyclic Graph, 21-shard design
AIDAG:LSC genesis ratio set — 1 AIDAG entitles 100 LSC at mainnet
Total supply locked: 2,100,000,000 LSC — immutable, no mint function
LSC Chain genesis initiated — SoulwareAI LSC Builder Cell activated

nextMilestone.msg: Block time target confirmed: 10ms — benchmarking Rust runtime options
